title: Items and subitems in workdocs
excerpt: Right now, whenever I create a workdoc, I only get the subitem names of a specific item. I’d love the ability to create docs (specifically templates) that’ll allow me to include subitem data as well within an item’s work…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now, whenever I create a workdoc, I only get the subitem names of a specific item. I’d love the ability to create docs (specifically templates) that’ll allow me to include subitem data as well within an item’s workdoc.

posts.author: LTen17 (Lisa T)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t even get subitems to show! How do you get subitems to show?
